speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: Oklahoma City Thunder beat the San Antonio Spurs in Game 7 and win the series.
argument: Championship pedigree: Draymond will keep picking the defending champions until someone actually beats them; Home-court edge: He says OKC's role players have been much better at home and Game 7 is in Oklahoma City; Depth advantage: He argues the Thunder's bench and depth have outperformed San Antonio's across the series; Physicality edge: He believes a physical whistle favors OKC because the Thunder have made SAS struggle with that style.
grade_note: SAS beat OKC 111-103 in Game 7 and won the series 4-3, so OKC did not win Game 7 or the series.
grade_note_general: SAS beat OKC 4-3, so OKC did not win the series.
